---
title: "Landskapsanalys R9 - Sammanstallning av alla lager"
subtitle: "Kapitel per lagerutdata (byggs pa efterhand)"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    number-sections: true
    embed-resources: true
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Visa kod"
lang: sv
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Syfte

Rapporten samlar lager som ar klara i R9-flodet. Varje klart lager far:

- en kort text om vad som gjorts,
- en karta (PNG),
- en lokal interaktiv kontrollkarta (HTML, lager in + lager ut),
- en kort tabell med nyckeltal.

Nar lager 02, 03 osv ar klara och far en bild, dyker de upp automatiskt i rapporten.

```{r, results='asis'}
repo <- normalizePath(file.path(getwd(), "..", "..", ".."), winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
layer_csv <- file.path(repo, "script", "semi_manual_r9", "config", "bornholm_r9_geocontext_layers.csv")
priority_csv <- file.path(repo, "script", "semi_manual_r9", "config", "bornholm_r9_priority_order_proposed.csv")
run_order_csv <- file.path(repo, "script", "semi_manual_r9", "config", "bornholm_r9_run_order.csv")
layer_out_dir <- file.path(repo, "data", "interim", "geocontext_r9", "layers")
figure_dir <- file.path(repo, "docs", "geocontext", "figures")
review_dir <- file.path(repo, "docs", "geocontext", "review")
source(file.path(repo, "script", "semi_manual_r9", "lib", "subcategory_splits.R"))
split_cfg <- read_subcategory_splits(file.path(repo, "script", "semi_manual_r9"), active_only = TRUE)

layers <- read.csv(layer_csv, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
layers$include <- as.logical(layers$include)
layers <- layers[layers$include, , drop = FALSE]
layers$layer_index <- seq_len(nrow(layers))

if (file.exists(priority_csv)) {
  pr <- read.csv(priority_csv, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  pr$proposed_order <- as.integer(pr$proposed_order)
  layers$run_order <- pr$proposed_order[match(layers$layer_key, pr$layer_key)]
} else {
  layers$run_order <- layers$layer_index
}
layers$run_order[is.na(layers$run_order)] <- layers$layer_index[is.na(layers$run_order)]

report_min_step <- 1L
report_max_step <- max(layers$run_order, na.rm = TRUE)
layers <- layers[layers$run_order >= report_min_step & layers$run_order <= report_max_step, , drop = FALSE]

layers$out_csv <- file.path(
  layer_out_dir,
  sprintf("%02d_%s.csv", layers$layer_index, layers$layer_key)
)
layers$has_output <- file.exists(layers$out_csv)

completed <- layers[layers$has_output, , drop = FALSE]
pending <- layers[!layers$has_output, , drop = FALSE]
completed <- completed[order(completed$run_order), , drop = FALSE]
pending <- pending[order(pending$run_order), , drop = FALSE]

cat("Klart just nu: ", nrow(completed), " av ", nrow(layers), " lager.\n\n", sep = "")
if (nrow(pending) > 0) {
  cat("Nasta steg som saknar utdata: ", paste(head(sprintf("%02d", pending$run_order), 8), collapse = ", "), "\n\n", sep = "")
}
```

## Aktiv korordning

```{r, results='asis'}
if (file.exists(run_order_csv)) {
  ro <- read.csv(run_order_csv, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  ro <- ro[ro$run_order >= report_min_step & ro$run_order <= report_max_step, , drop = FALSE]
  if (file.exists(priority_csv)) {
    pr <- read.csv(priority_csv, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    ro <- merge(
      ro,
      pr[, c("layer_key", "theme", "bang_reason")],
      by = "layer_key",
      all.x = TRUE,
      sort = FALSE
    )
    ro <- ro[order(ro$run_order), , drop = FALSE]
  }
  show_cols <- c("run_order", "original_layer_index", "display_name", "theme", "bang_reason")
  show_cols <- intersect(show_cols, names(ro))
  cat(knitr::kable(ro[show_cols], format = "html", align = c("r", "r", "l", "l", "l")))
} else {
  cat("_Ingen korordningsfil hittades._")
}
```

## Forslagstatus: Nya lager i denna revision

```{r, results='asis'}
implemented_layers <- data.frame(
  lager = c(
    "DHM relief (hojdskillnad inom hex)",
    "DHM hogsta punkt (fran hojdkurvor)",
    "Markblokke 2026 (Bornholm)"
  ),
  status = c("Kord", "Kord", "Kord"),
  utkolumn = c(
    "dhm_hoejdekurver_relief_m",
    "dhm_hoejdekurver_highest_point_m",
    "markblokke_2026_bornholm_area_share"
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
cat(knitr::kable(implemented_layers, format = "html", align = c("l", "c", "l")))
```

## Kvar att overvaga

```{r, results='asis'}
missing_layers <- data.frame(
  forslag = c(
    "Hojklassig jordbruksjord (bonitet / jordklass)",
    "Dricksvattenintressen / grundvattenskydd",
    "Oversvamningsrisk / lavpunkter",
    "Lutning + exponering (DEM-derivat)",
    "Rekreation och friluftsliv (leder, naturomraden med besokstryck)",
    "Planlagd markanvandning (kommuneplan, lokalplan)",
    "Arkeologiska skyddsomraden / fornlammningar"
  ),
  varfor = c(
    "Visar var marken har hog produktions- och bevarandevikt",
    "Kritisk restriktion i fysisk planering",
    "Viktig klimat- och robusthetsdimension",
    "Styr synlighet, erosion, tillganglighet och teknisk byggbarhet",
    "Ger socialt bruksvarde i landskapet",
    "Kopplar analysen till faktisk tillstandsproning",
    "Fangar kulturarvsvarden som ofta styr lokalisering"
  ),
  prioritet = c("Hog", "Hog", "Hog", "Medel", "Medel", "Hog", "Medel"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
cat(knitr::kable(missing_layers, format = "html", align = c("l", "l", "c")))
```

```{r, results='asis'}
first_existing <- function(paths) {
  hit <- paths[file.exists(paths)]
  if (length(hit) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  hit[1]
}

render_short_table <- function(out_csv, value_col = NULL) {
  out <- read.csv(out_csv, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  value_cols <- setdiff(names(out), "hex_id")
  if (length(value_cols) == 0) {
    tbl <- data.frame(
      indikator = c("Antal hexagoner", "Primar utkolumn"),
      varde = c(nrow(out), "Saknas"),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    cat(knitr::kable(tbl, format = "html", align = c("l", "r")))
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  select_primary_value_col <- function(out_df) {
    value_cols <- setdiff(names(out_df), "hex_id")
    if (length(value_cols) == 0) return(NA_character_)

    preferred_patterns <- c(
      "_length_m_total$",
      "_area_share$",
      "_count$",
      "_sum$",
      "_length_m($|_)",
      "_m$"
    )
    for (pat in preferred_patterns) {
      hit <- value_cols[grepl(pat, value_cols)]
      if (length(hit) > 0) return(hit[1])
    }

    numeric_cols <- value_cols[vapply(out_df[value_cols], is.numeric, logical(1))]
    if (length(numeric_cols) > 0) {
      nonzero_n <- vapply(numeric_cols, function(nm) {
        v <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(out_df[[nm]]))
        sum(!is.na(v) & v > 0)
      }, numeric(1))
      return(numeric_cols[which.max(nonzero_n)])
    }

    value_cols[1]
  }

  primary_col <- if (!is.null(value_col) && nzchar(value_col) && value_col %in% names(out)) {
    value_col
  } else {
    select_primary_value_col(out)
  }

  val <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(out[[primary_col]]))
  tbl <- data.frame(
    indikator = c("Antal hexagoner", "Primar utkolumn", "Hexagoner med > 0", "Maxvarde"),
    varde = c(
      nrow(out),
      primary_col,
      sum(!is.na(val) & val > 0),
      if (all(is.na(val))) NA_real_ else max(val, na.rm = TRUE)
    ),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  cat(knitr::kable(tbl, format = "html", align = c("l", "r")))
}

infer_geometry_and_treatment <- function(out_csv) {
  out <- read.csv(out_csv, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  value_cols <- setdiff(names(out), "hex_id")
  primary_col <- if (length(value_cols) > 0) value_cols[1] else "saknas"
  if (length(value_cols) == 0) {
    return(list(geometry = "Okand", treatment = "Ingen vardekolumn hittad i utdata."))
  }
  if (any(grepl("_length_m($|_)", value_cols))) {
    return(list(
      geometry = "Linje",
      treatment = "Aggregering med st_intersection i metrisk CRS och summerad langd (meter) per hexagon, per vagklass och total."
    ))
  }
  if (any(grepl("_area_share$", value_cols))) {
    return(list(
      geometry = "Polygon",
      treatment = "Aggregering med st_intersection i metrisk CRS och areaandel per hexagon."
    ))
  }
  if (any(grepl("_count$", value_cols)) || any(grepl("_sum$", value_cols))) {
    return(list(
      geometry = "Punkt",
      treatment = "Aggregering med st_intersects: antal objekt per hexagon (och ev. numerisk summa i *_sum)."
    ))
  }
  if (any(grepl("_m$", value_cols))) {
    return(list(
      geometry = "Hojdindikator",
      treatment = "Custom aggregering av hojdvardeskolumn (*_m), t.ex. relief (max-min) eller hogsta punkt per hexagon."
    ))
  }
  list(
    geometry = "Auto",
    treatment = paste0("Automatisk metod enligt aggregationsmotorn (primar utkolumn: ", primary_col, ").")
  )
}

as_file_url <- function(path) {
  norm <- normalizePath(path, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
  paste0("file:///", norm)
}

if (nrow(completed) == 0) {
  cat("## Inga klara lager annu\n\nKop minst ett lager och rendera om rapporten.\n")
}

for (i in seq_len(nrow(completed))) {
  row <- completed[i, , drop = FALSE]
  idx <- row$layer_index
  step_no <- row$run_order
  key <- row$layer_key
  title <- row$display_name

  cat("\n\n## Steg ", sprintf("%02d", step_no), ": ", title, "\n\n", sep = "")
  cat("### Kort text\n\n")
  cat(
    "Lager in lastes in och kvalitetssakrades, aggregerades till R9-hexagoner, ",
    "och skrevs till utdata for vidare analys.\n\n",
    sep = ""
  )
  cat("Originalt lagerindex: `", idx, "`\n\n", sep = "")
  cat("Script: `script/semi_manual_r9/layers/", sprintf("%02d", step_no), "_*.R`\n\n", sep = "")
  gt <- infer_geometry_and_treatment(row$out_csv)
  cat("Geometrityp: `", gt$geometry, "`\n\n", sep = "")
  cat("Aggregation: ", gt$treatment, "\n\n", sep = "")
  cat("Lager in: `", row$source_path, "`\n\n", sep = "")
  cat("Lager ut: `", row$out_csv, "`\n\n", sep = "")
  review_html <- file.path(review_dir, sprintf("layer%02d_review.html", step_no))
  if (file.exists(review_html)) {
    cat(
      "Lokal QA (interaktiv HTML, endast intern): [Oppna karta](",
      as_file_url(review_html),
      ")\n\n",
      sep = ""
    )
  } else {
    cat("Lokal QA (interaktiv HTML, endast intern): _saknas_\n\n")
  }

  fig_candidates <- c(
    file.path(figure_dir, sprintf("%02d_%s.png", idx, key)),
    file.path(figure_dir, sprintf("layer%02d_overview.png", step_no)),
    file.path(repo, "docs", "geocontext", sprintf("%02d_%s.png", idx, key)),
    if (idx == 1) file.path(repo, "docs", "geocontext", "layer01_fastboende_in_agg_out.png") else NA_character_,
    if (idx == 2) file.path(repo, "docs", "geocontext", "figures", "layer29_overview.png") else NA_character_,
    if (idx == 2) file.path(repo, "docs", "geocontext", "figures", "layer02_overview.png") else NA_character_
  )
  fig_path <- first_existing(na.omit(fig_candidates))

  cat("### Karta\n\n")
  if (!is.na(fig_path)) {
    img_uri <- knitr::image_uri(fig_path)
    cat("![](", img_uri, ")\n\n", sep = "")
    cat("\n\n")
  } else {
    cat("_Ingen bild hittad for detta lager._\n\n")
  }

  step_splits <- split_cfg[split_cfg$render_under_parent & split_cfg$parent_run_order == step_no, , drop = FALSE]
  step_children <- collapse_split_children(step_splits)
  if (nrow(step_children) > 0) {
    combined_child_html <- file.path(review_dir, sprintf("layer%02d_subcategories_review.html", step_no))
    cat("### Underkategorier\n\n")
    if (file.exists(combined_child_html)) {
      cat(
        "Samlad underkategorikarta (interaktiv HTML): [Oppna karta](",
        as_file_url(combined_child_html),
        ")\n\n",
        sep = ""
      )
    }
    for (j in seq_len(nrow(step_children))) {
      srow <- step_children[j, , drop = FALSE]
      child_values <- unique(step_splits$split_value[step_splits$child_key == srow$child_key])
      child_png <- file.path(figure_dir, sprintf("layer%02d_%s_overview.png", step_no, srow$child_key))
      child_html <- file.path(review_dir, sprintf("layer%02d_%s_review.html", step_no, srow$child_key))

      cat("#### ", srow$child_display_name, "\n\n", sep = "")
      if (length(child_values) == 1) {
        cat(
          "Uppdelat under originallagret via faltet `", srow$split_field,
          "` = `", child_values, "`.\n\n",
          sep = ""
        )
      } else {
        cat(
          "Uppdelat under originallagret via faltet `", srow$split_field,
          "` grupperat fran foljande vardekategorier: `",
          paste(child_values, collapse = "`, `"),
          "`.\n\n",
          sep = ""
        )
      }
      cat("Utdata-kolumn: `", srow$child_output_column, "`\n\n", sep = "")

      if (!is.na(child_png) && file.exists(child_png)) {
        cat("![](", knitr::image_uri(child_png), ")\n\n", sep = "")
      } else {
        cat("_Ingen separat bild hittad for denna underkategori._\n\n")
      }

      if (!is.na(child_html) && file.exists(child_html)) {
        cat(
          "Lokal QA (interaktiv HTML for underkategori): [Oppna karta](",
          as_file_url(child_html),
          ")\n\n",
          sep = ""
        )
      } else {
        cat("Lokal QA (interaktiv HTML for underkategori): _saknas_\n\n")
      }

      cat("##### Kort tabell\n\n")
      render_short_table(row$out_csv, value_col = srow$child_output_column)
      cat("\n\n")
    }
  }

  cat("### Kort tabell\n\n")

  render_short_table(row$out_csv)
  cat("\n\n")
}
```
